steps.title: Test the exclusive cause
steps.content: The student says the spider decline in the lizard enclosure was entirely caused by lizards. Evidence that spiders also declined without lizards would weaken that exclusive causal claim.

steps.title: Use the no-lizard decline
steps.content: Choice A gives only a starting baseline. Choice C discusses timing in the lizard enclosure, and Choice D supports some lizard effect by noting a lower final count with lizards. The weakening evidence is a substantial decline in the enclosure without lizards. The answer is B.
